method: Automated best-effort refresh from CORE/ICORE and SCImago, with previous data as fallback.

wisec.venue: ACM Conference on Security and Privacy in Wireless and Mobile Networks
wisec.note: CORE/ICORE uses A*, A, B, C. D is displayed only when no ranking is found.

wimob.venue: IEEE International Conference on Wireless and Mobile Computing, Networking and Communications

aiccsa.venue: ACS/IEEE International Conference on Computer Systems and Applications

iccsa.venue: International Conference on Computational Science and its Applications

tdsc.venue: IEEE Transactions on Dependable and Secure Computing
tdsc.note: Target journal for a manuscript under review; not a confirmed publication venue.

book-ai-cybersecurity.venue: AI for Cybersecurity: Research and Practice
book-ai-cybersecurity.note: Book chapters usually do not receive CORE conference ranks or SCImago journal quartiles.
